title: AI-Driven Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI-Driven Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <g fill='#B7D7CD' transform='translate(100, 100) scale(1)'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' rx='10' width='220' height='160' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='0' y='0' rx='10' width='200' height='140' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='210' y='0' rx='10' width='190' height='140' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='10' y='150' rx='10' width='180' height='90' fill='#C06C88'/>

    <text x='105' y='25' fill='#411C56' font-size='20' text-anchor='middle'>Real-Time Analytics</text>
    <text x='105' y='45' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' text-anchor='middle'>Dashboard</text>



    <path d='M80 50 L80 80 Q 80 110 70 110 L 50 110 Q 30 110 30 80 L 30 50' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
    <circle cx='80' cy='110' r='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <g transform='rotate(45 80 110)'>
      <path d='M 0 0 L 10 0 L 5 10 L 0 0' fill='#411C56'/>
      <path d='M 0 0 L -10 0 L -5 10 L 0 0' fill='#411C56'/>
    </g>
    <circle cx='110' cy='110' r='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <path d='M 130 50 L 130 80 Q 130 110 140 110 L 150 110 Q 160 110 160 80 L 160 50' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>

    <rect x='210' y='50' rx='10' width='40' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='240' y='70' fill='#411C56' font-size='14' text-anchor='start'>Query Playground</text>
  </g>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='200' y='0' width='200' height='20' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='0' y='280' width='400' height='20' fill='#090a0f'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
At least three charts must be displayed with dynamic data and interactive legends

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI-Driven Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations and Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
